fundamentals.name: Roblox Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Roblox Corporation operates an immersive platform for connection and communication in the United States and internationally. It offers Roblox Client, an application that allows users to explore immersive experience; Roblox Studio, a free toolset that allows developers and creators to build, publish, and operate immersive experiences and other content; and Roblox Cloud, which provides services and infrastructure that power the platform. Roblox Corporation was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in San Mateo, California.

geographic.name: Asia Pacific Including Australia And New Zealand

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but still loss-making with high valuation multiples and significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates with EPS of -0.35 vs -0.40; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 39.3% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.20B — positive cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $64.81.
Analyst growth estimates for current Q (11.4%) and FY (5.0%) show expected continued growth.
negatives: Operating margin -16.4% and Profit margin -20.7% — the company is not profitable.
Forward P/E -37.44 and Price/Book 84.69 — extremely high valuation multiples.
Current ratio 0.89 and Quick ratio 0.71 — liquidity is tight.

news.paragraph: Roblox is facing mixed sentiment following recent analyst actions and commentary. While one Yahoo Finance article pits it against GameStop as a potential buy and another assesses its undervaluation, a separate Yahoo Finance piece notes DA Davidson lowered its price target. Seeking Alpha also highlighted "red flags" that investors may have missed, contributing to a cautious outlook.
